frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing gauze suspended between clamps with two circular contour lines marked. Instruments positioned for initial approach.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial positioning of both instruments, gauze properly tensioned

frame_analyses.description: Left instrument grasping gauze for stabilization, right instrument (scissors) beginning initial cut at approximately 6 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper stabilization technique with non-cutting hand

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing clockwise around outer circle, currently at approximately 9 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, maintaining appropriate distance from line

frame_analyses.description: Cut has progressed to approximately 12 o'clock position, showing some deviation from marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Some minor wandering from optimal cutting path visible

frame_analyses.description: Cutting continues around circle at approximately 3 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining steady progress with reasonable line following

frame_analyses.description: Cut approaching completion of full circle at approximately 5 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good coordination between instruments for final approach

frame_analyses.description: Beginning inner circle cut, instruments repositioned for counterclockwise cutting
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth transition to inner circle cutting phase

frame_analyses.description: Inner circle cutting in progress, maintaining counterclockwise direction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument coordination for inner circle precision

frame_analyses.description: Continuing inner circle cut with careful attention to marked line
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Deliberate cutting pace appropriate for precision

frame_analyses.description: Inner circle cut nearly complete, final cuts being made
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task nearing completion with both circles cut

penalties.description: Minor deviation from marked line visible at 12 o'clock position on outer circle
Small deviations observed at various points around both circles

confidence_rationale: Line deviation measurements estimated from video angle and resolution. Exact millimeter deviations difficult to assess precisely from overhead view. Completion time and overall technique clearly observable.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements of line deviation at all cardinal points due to camera resolution and angle
Precise measurement of deviation at 3 and 9 o'clock positions due to instrument obstruction
technique_summary: Intermediate level performance with systematic approach to both circles. Good instrument coordination and gauze stabilization. Primary penalties from minor line deviations during cutting phases.
strengths: Appropriate cutting speed for precision work
Complete task execution within reasonable time
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining consistent distance from marked lines throughout cutting
Practice smoother cutting motions to reduce minor deviations
Work on reducing total time while maintaining precision
